title: Auto-analyse PDFs/images → validate online → store to L2
what_failed: When Ash sends a PDF or image, Pi should automatically analyse it, extract key facts, validate them via web_search, store confirmed facts to L2, and flag anything that doesn't check out before storing.
suggested_fix: On incoming PDF/image: 1) analyze_media to extract content, 2) web_search key claims for validation, 3) memory_write to L2 if validated, 4) alert Ash if any fact fails validation or is unverifiable.
